Table 8: Average processing time per image (LOL images at 400 × 267 resolution). Deep learning times are published values at original resolution on GPU.

Figure 3: Convergence of the BOA-FA hybrid optimization on a representative LOL test image. The BOA phase (iterations 1–6) performs global exploration, followed by the FA phase (iterations 7–11) for local refinement.

Table 5: Quantitative comparison on the LOL dataset [47] (15 test image pairs, mean ± std). Best traditional method in bold, second best underlined. All results computed from our executed implementation.
Table 6: Comparison with deep learning methods on the LOL dataset (published results from original papers).
Table 7: Ablation study results averaged over 15 LOL test images.
